layers.name: Public API
layers.summary_zh: Retrofit 入口、Call/Callback/Response 及 CallAdapter/Converter SPI 接口
layers.summary_en: The Retrofit entry point, Call/Callback/Response, and the CallAdapter/Converter SPI interfaces

classes.name: Call
classes.description_zh: 表示一次可同步执行或异步入队的 HTTP 调用的核心接口
classes.description_en: Core interface representing a single HTTP call that can be executed synchronously or enqueued asynchronously

classes.name: CallAdapter
classes.description_zh: 把 Call<T> 适配为其他返回类型的 SPI 接口
classes.description_en: SPI interface that adapts Call<T> into other return types

classes.name: Callback
classes.description_zh: 异步调用成功或失败时回调的接口
classes.description_en: Callback interface invoked on asynchronous success or failure

classes.name: Converter
classes.description_zh: 在对象与请求/响应体字节之间转换的 SPI 接口
classes.description_en: SPI interface that converts between objects and request/response body bytes

classes.name: Invocation
classes.description_zh: 记录被调用的服务方法与实参，可在 OkHttp 拦截器中读取以做监控
classes.description_en: Captures the invoked service method and its arguments for retrieval inside OkHttp interceptors

classes.name: Response
classes.description_zh: 封装 HTTP 状态码、响应头与反序列化后的响应体
classes.description_en: Wraps the HTTP status code, headers, and the deserialized response body

classes.name: Retrofit
classes.description_zh: 适配 Java 接口为 HTTP 调用的入口，经 Builder 配置后用动态代理生成接口实现
classes.description_en: Entry point that adapts a Java interface to HTTP calls, configured via Builder and realized through a dynamic proxy

layers.name: HTTP Annotations
layers.summary_zh: 声明 HTTP 方法、参数与请求体的注解 DSL
layers.summary_en: The annotation DSL declaring HTTP methods, parameters, and bodies

classes.name: GET
classes.description_zh: 声明一个 HTTP GET 请求及其相对路径
classes.description_en: Declares an HTTP GET request and its relative path

classes.name: POST
classes.description_zh: 声明一个 HTTP POST 请求及其相对路径
classes.description_en: Declares an HTTP POST request and its relative path

classes.name: PUT
classes.description_zh: 声明一个 HTTP PUT 请求及其相对路径
classes.description_en: Declares an HTTP PUT request and its relative path

classes.name: DELETE
classes.description_zh: 声明一个 HTTP DELETE 请求及其相对路径
classes.description_en: Declares an HTTP DELETE request and its relative path

classes.name: HTTP
classes.description_zh: 声明任意自定义 HTTP 方法（可带请求体）
classes.description_en: Declares an arbitrary custom HTTP method, optionally with a body

classes.name: Path
classes.description_zh: 用方法参数替换 URL 中的命名占位段
classes.description_en: Replaces a named path segment in the URL with a method argument

classes.name: Query
classes.description_zh: 把方法参数追加为 URL 查询参数
classes.description_en: Appends a method argument as a URL query parameter

classes.name: Url
classes.description_zh: 用方法参数提供完整的动态请求 URL
classes.description_en: Supplies the full request URL dynamically from a method argument

classes.name: Body
classes.description_zh: 把方法参数作为请求体交给转换器序列化
classes.description_en: Sends a method argument as the request body to be serialized by a converter

classes.name: Field
classes.description_zh: 在表单编码请求中以键值字段发送参数
classes.description_en: Sends a parameter as a key/value field in a form-encoded request

classes.name: Header
classes.description_zh: 用方法参数设置一个请求头
classes.description_en: Sets a request header from a method argument

classes.name: FormUrlEncoded
classes.description_zh: 标记方法发送表单 URL 编码的请求体
classes.description_en: Marks the method as sending a form-URL-encoded request body

classes.name: Multipart
classes.description_zh: 标记方法发送 multipart 多部分请求体
classes.description_en: Marks the method as sending a multipart request body

classes.name: Streaming
classes.description_zh: 标记响应体应以流式返回而非缓冲进内存
classes.description_en: Marks the response body to be streamed rather than buffered into memory

layers.name: Service Method Engine
layers.summary_zh: 把注解化的接口方法解析并适配成可执行的服务方法
layers.summary_en: Parses and adapts annotated interface methods into executable service methods

classes.name: DefaultMethodSupport
classes.description_zh: 在被代理接口上调用 Java 默认方法的辅助类
classes.description_en: Helper that invokes Java default methods on a proxied interface

classes.name: HttpServiceMethod
classes.description_zh: 解析注解、绑定 CallAdapter 与响应 Converter，并把一次调用适配成 HTTP 调用
classes.description_en: Parses annotations, binds the CallAdapter and response Converter, and adapts an invocation into an HTTP call

classes.name: ServiceMethod
classes.description_zh: 把接口方法解析为可复用调用模型的抽象基类
classes.description_en: Abstract base that parses an interface method into a reusable invocation model

layers.name: Request Pipeline
layers.summary_zh: 依据注解把方法调用与参数装配成 OkHttp 请求
layers.summary_en: Assembles a method invocation and its arguments into an OkHttp request

classes.name: ParameterHandler
classes.description_zh: 把单个带注解的方法参数写入请求构建器的处理器
classes.description_en: Handler that applies a single annotated method parameter to the request builder

classes.name: RequestBuilder
classes.description_zh: 逐步累积 URL、请求头与请求体来构建底层请求
classes.description_en: Incrementally accumulates the URL, headers, and body to build the underlying request

classes.name: RequestFactory
classes.description_zh: 依据方法与参数注解把一次调用装配成 okhttp3.Request
classes.description_en: Assembles a call into an okhttp3.Request from its method and parameter annotations

layers.name: Call Execution
layers.summary_zh: 对 OkHttp 发起调用并把原始响应封装成 Response
layers.summary_en: Drives the OkHttp call and wraps the raw response into a Response

classes.name: HttpException
classes.description_zh: 当响应为非 2xx 状态码并被适配时抛出的异常
classes.description_en: Exception thrown when a non-2xx response is adapted

classes.name: OkHttpCall
classes.description_zh: Call 的默认实现，驱动 OkHttp 执行并把原始响应解析为 Response
classes.description_en: The default Call implementation that drives OkHttp and parses the raw response into a Response

classes.name: SkipCallbackExecutorImpl
classes.description_zh: @SkipCallbackExecutor 标记注解的运行时实现，用于跳过回调执行器
classes.description_en: Runtime implementation of the @SkipCallbackExecutor marker that bypasses the callback executor

layers.name: Call Adapters
layers.summary_zh: 把 Call<T> 适配为 RxJava/Guava/Java8 等异步返回类型
layers.summary_en: Adapts Call<T> to async return types like RxJava, Guava, and Java 8 futures

classes.name: GuavaCallAdapterFactory
classes.description_zh: 把 Call 适配为 Guava ListenableFuture 的工厂
classes.description_en: Factory that adapts a Call into a Guava ListenableFuture

classes.name: CallArbiter
classes.description_zh: 协调 RxJava 订阅背压与取消的仲裁器
classes.description_en: Arbiter coordinating backpressure and cancellation for an RxJava subscription

classes.name: CallEnqueueOnSubscribe
classes.description_zh: 订阅时以异步入队执行 Call 的 RxJava 桥接
classes.description_en: RxJava bridge that executes the Call via async enqueue on subscribe

classes.name: CallExecuteOnSubscribe
classes.description_zh: 订阅时以同步执行运行 Call 的 RxJava 桥接
classes.description_en: RxJava bridge that runs the Call synchronously on subscribe

classes.name: RxJavaCallAdapter
classes.description_zh: 把 Call 适配为 RxJava 1 的 Observable
classes.description_en: Adapts a Call into an RxJava 1 Observable

classes.name: RxJava2CallAdapter
classes.description_zh: 把 Call 适配为 RxJava 2 的响应式类型
classes.description_en: Adapts a Call into RxJava 2 reactive types

classes.name: RxJava3CallAdapter
classes.description_zh: 把 Call 适配为 RxJava 3 的响应式类型
classes.description_en: Adapts a Call into RxJava 3 reactive types

classes.name: RxJava3CallAdapterFactory
classes.description_zh: 为 RxJava 3 返回类型创建 CallAdapter 的工厂
classes.description_en: Factory that creates CallAdapters for RxJava 3 return types

classes.name: BodyCallAdapter
classes.description_zh: 把 Call 适配为只产出响应体的 Scala 异步类型
classes.description_en: Adapts a Call into a Scala async type that yields only the body

classes.name: ResponseCallAdapter
classes.description_zh: 把 Call 适配为产出完整 Response 的 Scala 异步类型
classes.description_en: Adapts a Call into a Scala async type that yields the full Response

classes.name: CompletableFutureCallAdapterFactory
classes.description_zh: 把 Call 适配为 java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture
classes.description_en: Adapts a Call into a java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture

classes.name: DefaultCallAdapterFactory
classes.description_zh: 内建适配器工厂，直接返回 Call 或用回调执行器包装它
classes.description_en: Built-in adapter factory that returns the Call directly or wraps it with the callback executor

layers.name: Converters
layers.summary_zh: 在对象与请求/响应体字节间序列化（Gson/Moshi/Jackson 等）
layers.summary_en: Serializes objects to and from request/response bodies (Gson, Moshi, Jackson, …)

classes.name: GsonConverterFactory
classes.description_zh: 基于 Gson 的 JSON 转换器工厂
classes.description_en: Gson-based JSON converter factory

classes.name: GsonRequestBodyConverter
classes.description_zh: 用 Gson 把对象序列化为 JSON 请求体
classes.description_en: Serializes an object into a JSON request body via Gson

classes.name: GsonResponseBodyConverter
classes.description_zh: 用 Gson 把 JSON 响应体反序列化为对象
classes.description_en: Deserializes a JSON response body into an object via Gson

classes.name: JacksonConverterFactory
classes.description_zh: 基于 Jackson 的 JSON 转换器工厂
classes.description_en: Jackson-based JSON converter factory

classes.name: JacksonRequestBodyConverter
classes.description_zh: 用 Jackson 把对象序列化为 JSON 请求体
classes.description_en: Serializes an object into a JSON request body via Jackson

classes.name: Factory
classes.description_zh: 基于 Kotlinx Serialization 的转换器工厂
classes.description_en: Converter factory backed by Kotlinx Serialization

classes.name: MoshiConverterFactory
classes.description_zh: 基于 Moshi 的 JSON 转换器工厂
classes.description_en: Moshi-based JSON converter factory

classes.name: MoshiRequestBodyConverter
classes.description_zh: 用 Moshi 把对象序列化为 JSON 请求体
classes.description_en: Serializes an object into a JSON request body via Moshi

classes.name: ProtoConverterFactory
classes.description_zh: 基于 Protocol Buffers 的转换器工厂
classes.description_en: Protocol Buffers converter factory

classes.name: ProtoRequestBodyConverter
classes.description_zh: 把 protobuf 消息序列化为请求体
classes.description_en: Serializes a protobuf message into a request body

classes.name: SimpleXmlConverterFactory
classes.description_zh: 基于 Simple XML 的转换器工厂
classes.description_en: Simple XML converter factory

classes.name: WireConverterFactory
classes.description_zh: 基于 Wire 的 protobuf 转换器工厂
classes.description_en: Wire protobuf converter factory

classes.name: WireRequestBodyConverter
classes.description_zh: 用 Wire 把 protobuf 消息序列化为请求体
classes.description_en: Serializes a protobuf message into a request body via Wire

classes.name: BuiltInConverters
classes.description_zh: 内建转换器工厂，处理 ResponseBody/Void/Unit 等原始类型
classes.description_en: Built-in converter factory handling raw types such as ResponseBody, Void, and Unit

classes.name: OptionalConverterFactory
classes.description_zh: 为包裹在 java.util.Optional 中的响应体提供转换
classes.description_en: Provides conversion for response bodies wrapped in java.util.Optional

layers.name: Platform & Internal
layers.summary_zh: 屏蔽 JVM/Android 平台差异并提供反射与类型工具
layers.summary_en: Abstracts JVM/Android platform differences and provides reflection and type utilities

classes.name: AndroidMainExecutor
classes.description_zh: 把回调投递到 Android 主线程的执行器
classes.description_en: Executor that dispatches callbacks onto the Android main thread

classes.name: BuiltInFactories
classes.description_zh: 按平台 Java 版本提供默认 CallAdapter/Converter 工厂
classes.description_en: Supplies default CallAdapter/Converter factories based on the platform Java version

classes.name: Platform
classes.description_zh: 静态选择 JVM/Android/RoboVM 平台的回调执行器、反射与内建工厂
classes.description_en: Statically selects the JVM/Android/RoboVM callback executor, reflection, and built-in factories

classes.name: Reflection
classes.description_zh: 跨平台调用接口默认方法的反射封装
classes.description_en: Reflection wrapper for invoking interface default methods across platforms

classes.name: Utils
classes.description_zh: 类型解析与请求体缓冲等内部工具集合
classes.description_en: Internal utilities for type resolution and request-body buffering

layer_groups.name: Public Surface
layer_groups.summary_zh: 用户直接使用的公共类型与声明式注解
layer_groups.summary_en: The public types and declarative annotations users touch directly

layer_groups.name: Pluggable SPI
layer_groups.summary_zh: 把 Call<T> 适配到其他异步类型、把请求/响应体在对象与字节间互转
layer_groups.summary_en: Adapts Call<T> to other async types and converts request/response bodies to and from objects

flows.name_zh: 一次请求的完整生命周期
flows.description_zh: 从调用接口方法到拿到反序列化响应，横贯解析、装配、执行与转换各子系统
flows.description_en: From invoking an API method to receiving a deserialized response, threading parse, assembly, execution, and conversion

flows.description_zh: 把接口方法上的注解一次性反射解析为可复用、可执行的服务方法模型
flows.description_en: Reflectively parses a method’s annotations once into a reusable, executable service-method model

flows.description_zh: 在每次调用时由参数处理器依注解把实参写入请求构建器，产出 okhttp3.Request
flows.description_en: On each call, parameter handlers apply arguments per their annotations into the builder, producing an okhttp3.Request

links.label_zh: 写入 URL / 头 / 体

flows.description_zh: 入队后由 OkHttp 完成网络调用，解析并转换响应，再经回调执行器投递到目标线程
flows.description_en: After enqueue, OkHttp completes the network call; the response is parsed and converted, then delivered through the callback executor

flows.description_zh: 按注册顺序依次询问每个 Converter.Factory，第一个返回非空转换器者胜出
flows.description_en: Asks each Converter.Factory in registration order; the first to return a non-null converter wins

flows.description_zh: 按顺序询问每个 CallAdapter.Factory 选出适配器，再把 Call 包装成方法声明的返回类型
flows.description_en: Picks an adapter by asking each CallAdapter.Factory in order, then wraps the Call into the method’s declared return type
